question: What is Runa?
answer: Runa is your personal, AI-powered running companion. It helps you log your runs, analyze your pace, build up your streaks, and ultimately stay consistent with smart, actionable insights.

question: Is my data safe on Runa?
answer: Absolutely! Right now, all your running data is securely stored locally right in your browser. Just keep in mind that if you completely clear your browser's local storage, your data will be wiped out too. We highly recommend downloading a backup from the Settings page every now and then!

question: What can I track with Runa?
answer: You can log all the essentials: your run distance, duration, average speed, and even personal notes about how the run felt. Runa then takes these details to generate beautiful charts, heatmaps, and progress stats.

question: Can I edit or delete my runs?
answer: Yep! We all make typos. You can easily edit or delete any of your past runs from your History tab, and all your stats and charts will update instantly.

question: Does Runa support goals and streaks?
answer: It sure does. You can set weekly distance goals to push yourself, and our Dashboard will track your daily running streaks and display them on a cool activity heatmap to keep you motivated.

question: What are AI Insights?
answer: Think of AI Insights as your pocket running coach. Runa analyzes your recent performance trends and gives you personalized tips, alerts you if you're pushing too hard, and celebrates your wins with tailored feedback.

question: Can I see analytics and charts?
answer: Definitely! The Analytics page is packed with deep dives into your data. You'll find heatmaps, pace vs. distance trends, weekly goal comparisons, and monthly progress rings. You can even filter the data and download your favorite charts as images to share!

question: Can I back up my data?
answer: Yes, and we actually remind you to do so! You can easily export your data as a backup file from the Settings page and restore it whenever you need to switch browsers or devices.

question: Will Runa support cloud backup in the future?
answer: Yes, that’s on the roadmap! We are planning to add optional cloud backups so you can securely sync your running history across all your devices without losing control of your data.

question: Does Runa work on mobile devices?
answer: 100%. Runa is fully responsive and designed to feel just like a native app on your phone, complete with a convenient bottom navigation bar for easy access during your cool-downs.

question: How can I give feedback?
answer: We love hearing from users! You can share your thoughts, feature requests, or bug reports directly through the feedback section in the app. It really helps shape future updates.

question: Why is there no light mode?
answer: Right now, Runa rocks a sleek, dark aesthetic to look great and save battery. But don't worry—a proper Light Mode is actively in the works and will be rolling out soon!
